examples: Jody has a PhD in nutrition, but more important, she has personal experience.
Sometimes, Jody feels that she succeeds in persuading some students to stop dieting.
In spite of the long trip, Jody arrived looking as if she had come out of a bandbox.
"Our guidelines are pretty stringent, " says Jody Ensman, who manages the university's health-and-wellness program.
Take the case of Jody Miller, an exercise physiologist who wanted to have a baby.
